agentEval.command: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const input = JSON.parse(process.env.HARNESS_CASE_INPUT || '{}'); const trace = { steps: [{ kind: 'prompt', value: input.prompt || 'replace-me' }] }; fs.writeFileSync(process.env.HARNESS_TRACE_FILE, JSON.stringify(trace, null, 2)); console.log(input.expectedLabel || 'score:ok');"
